description_long: This is a detailed residential neighborhood scene featuring multiple modern houses, each with distinct architectural elements and landscaping. The houses are arranged along paved roads and are surrounded by green lawns, trees, and shrubbery. Several properties include amenities such as swimming pools, tennis courts, and patios, with driveways and garages visible. The buildings are primarily white or light gray, with flat and hip roofs, large windows, and some outdoor seating areas. The layout is spacious, with clear separations between properties and communal green spaces. The overall environment suggests a high-end suburban development with a focus on comfort, recreation, and privacy.
description: A modern residential neighborhood with multiple houses, green lawns, pools, and recreational areas, arranged along paved roads.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side facades of several houses, showcasing swimming pools, patios, and landscaped gardens.
description_view_1: This angle provides a broad overview of the neighborhood, emphasizing the central tennis court, driveways, and the arrangement of houses around communal spaces.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the front yards and main entrances of several houses, as well as a large green lawn and the overall street layout.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the front facades of the houses, with visible entryways, garages, and a prominent hip-roofed house in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature wide doors, some with overhangs or small porches, and are often flanked by large windows or columns.
